one_time_description: Settlement proceeds from Treaty Annuities Specific Claim - Government of Canada failed to pay promised annual annuities to members between 1885-1888 and to Chiefs and Councillors between 1885-1914
economic_notes: Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Aspen Developments Inc., Muskeg Lake Economic Development Limited Partnership, and MLCN Community Store Ltd. Combined GBE revenue was $23,804,630 with net income of $2,684,318. MLCN Economic Development LP made distributions including mortgage payments on Elders Care Home ($343,667), LP distributions ($172,512), Christmas distribution ($75,000), education payment ($47,600). Aspen Developments Inc. paid dividends of $200,000.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Province is Saskatchewan based on Saskatoon Tribal Council affiliation and TLE agreement with Saskatchewan. Three GBEs on modified equity basis: Aspen Developments Inc., Muskeg Lake Economic Development LP, and MLCN Community Store Ltd. - not fully consolidated. Large one-time settlement of $3,331,185 received subsequent to year-end for Treaty Annuities Specific Claim. ISC funding in accounts receivable includes $3,321,175 Government of Canada Rebellion Band Claim settlement receivable. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($13,112,838) + ISC clawback (-$12,612) + ISC Health Canada ($1,124,784) + CMHC ($197,258) + Saskatoon Tribal Council ($3,137,127) = $17,559,395 less clawback = $17,422,270 (net). No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements. Annual debt service reflects repayment of operating loans only ($343,902); advances on long-term debt of $315,987 also noted. Community Services expenses of $377,166 not mapped to a standard category.
